P.F. Chang's | Restaurant Menu
Lunar New Year Menu
Ring in Lunar New Year with a limited-time menu full of bold, festive flavors, highlighted by our new Pork Belly Bao Buns and other crave-worthy favorites.
Perfect for celebrating your way.

*These items are cooked to order and may be served raw or undercooked. Consuming raw or undercooked meats, poultry, seafood, shellfish or eggs may increase your risk of food borne illness.
